note: Canonical, source-verified registry of the services/machines this cockpit talks to. Each component records the file the fact was verified from. Facts NOT verifiable from this repo are omitted rather than guessed. Update last_verified and the relevant source when a fact changes.

components.name: VIDTOOLZ Cockpit / Package Engine
components.role: Operator cockpit and package-run engine (HTTP server, no framework). Serves all cockpit pages and package-run APIs.

components.name: AIGEN Review View
components.role: Reviews AI-generated MP4 clips before Resolve. Proxied into the cockpit; not started by the cockpit.
components.health_check: Cockpit proxies it; a 502 from the cockpit means it is not running.

components.name: PRESTO ComfyUI (Wan2.2 video generation)
components.role: Remote GPU worker. Generates Wan2.2 image-to-video clips for the 81-frame production lane.
components.health_check: Cockpit pre-flight checks reachability before submitting a PRESTO job.

components.name: FLUX image generation (handoff script)
components.role: Local FLUX text-to-image generation, run as a child script (no standalone HTTP port). Submitted through the cockpit /api/flux/* routes.

components.name: VIDNAS shared media storage
components.role: NAS holding shared media and the aigen library. Source of media for Resolve; destination for staged clips and final exports. The cockpit scope ends at staging clips here ('ready for Resolve').

not_verified_here.name: Hermes Mission Control
not_verified_here.reason: Defined in a separate repo (hermes-mission-control), not in this repo. Its port is not declared in any file here, so it is intentionally left out of the verified component list rather than guessed.
